headline: A Look At GXO Logistics (GXO) Valuation After New AI Truck, Defense Alliance And Hasbro Expansion
summary: GXO Logistics (GXO) has put automation, defense work and branded consumer logistics firmly in focus, rolling out its first AI powered autonomous truck in France while expanding alliances and opening Hasbro’s new flagship distribution hub. See our latest analysis for GXO Logistics. Despite the recent AI and defense announcements, the share price has pulled back, with a 1-month share price return of a 21.6% decline and a year-to-date share price return of a 5.6% decline. Meanwhile, the 1-year...
